testcase.name: test_get_customers_list

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'customers' in [{'address_line_1': None, 'address_line_2': None, 'business_registration_number': None, 'city': 'Dar es Salaam', ...}, {'address_line_1': None, 'address_line_2': None, 'business_registration_number': None, 'city': 'Dar es Salaam', ...}, {'address_line_1': None, 'address_line_2': None, 'business_registration_number': None, 'city': 'Dar es Salaam', ...}, {'address_line_1': None, 'address_line_2': None, 'business_registration_number': None, 'city': 'Dar es Salaam', ...}, {'address_line_1': None, 'address_line_2': None, 'business_registration_number': None, 'city': None, ...}, {'address_line_1': None, 'address_line_2': None, 'business_registration_number': None, 'city': None, ...}, ...]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_deal_linkage_commercial.py:469: in test_get_customers_list assert "customers" in data E AssertionError: assert 'customers' in [{'address_line_1': None, 'address_line_2': None, 'business_registration_number': None, 'city': 'Dar es Salaam', ...}, {'address_line_1': None, 'address_line_2': None, 'business_registration_number': None, 'city': 'Dar es Salaam', ...}, {'address_line_1': None, 'address_line_2': None, 'business_registration_number': None, 'city': 'Dar es Salaam', ...}, {'address_line_1': None, 'address_line_2': None, 'business_registration_number': None, 'city': 'Dar es Salaam', ...}, {'address_line_1': None, 'address_line_2': None, 'business_registration_number': None, 'city': None, ...}, {'address_line_1': None, 'address_line_2': None, 'business_registration_number': None, 'city': None, ...}, ...]
